description: Live fills can occur at actual exchange prices with rejections or partial fills, while current backtests use simulated fill assumptions.
mitigation: Introduce execution reports and adapter capability tests before comparing live fill economics to simulated fills.

description: Entry submissions that can fill immediately now queue a fill sync and drain it after strategy on_bar state is stored.
mitigation: Covered by tests/live/test_entry_fill_protection.py; keep protective-stop race regressions in the live test set.

description: SQLite OMS now records orders, stateful fill ingestion, lifecycle state, snapshots, and fill watermarks; the remaining gap is full startup discrepancy repair for unmanaged exchange state.
mitigation: Covered in part by tests/live/test_fill_routing.py, tests/live/test_entry_fill_protection.py, and tests/live/test_oms_store.py; complete restart drills for unmanaged orders, partial exits, missed fills, and protective state before claiming full restart parity.

description: Single-strategy, portfolio, and live bar dispatch delegate to StrategySlotRuntime, and mocked live replay is compared against backtest decision/order-intent output.
mitigation: Covered by tests/parity/test_strategy_runtime_single_vs_live_replay.py; continue expanding fixtures for fills, exits, and portfolio scenarios.

description: Historical, live, and replay market bars now share canonical open_time, close_time, and available_at semantics through MarketEvent and shared candle-boundary helpers.
mitigation: Covered by tests/parity/test_market_event_timestamps.py and tests/parity/test_strategy_runtime.py; keep expanding fixtures as new market-data adapters are added.

description: Portfolio backtests now default to terminal marks, but force-close remains available as an explicit legacy accounting mode.
mitigation: Keep terminal-mark/force-close characterization tests and ensure reports label the selected accounting mode.

description: TradeOutcome, metrics, instrumentation, daily aggregation, Postgres net PnL, and simulated/live partial exits now share explicit gross price PnL, fee, funding, and realized net semantics.
mitigation: Covered by tests/parity/test_trade_outcome_accounting.py, tests/parity/test_runtime_types.py, tests/test_partial_fill_pnl.py, tests/live/test_lifecycle.py, tests/test_instrumentation.py, and tests/test_postgres_sink.py.
